title: Evangelion 13 and its control systems
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 13 and its control systems             Quote Post by AsukaShikinami10 » Mon Nov 17, 2025 7:49 am Today I was watching an early design of Evangelion 8 (which later became Evangelion 13) and I remembered how similar was its helmet design to the one of the awakened Unit-01, and that made me remember an old discussion about Evangelion 8 being Unit-01 with new armor. That triggered in my mind Kaworu mentioning Evangelion 13's control system once Shinji was determined to take the spears from both Lilith and Mark.06, seemingly not responding to him anymore, yet Shinji was still able to pilot the Unit once that happened. Kaworu also mentioned the Evangelion needed 2 pilots (souls) to handle both spears (1 for each soul), but if that is the case, then the Evangelion 13 may need 1 control system per pilot. What if way back in early drafts of the Evangelion Q script (when there was no timeskip yet) Evangelion 8 was in reality a rearmored Unit-01 with 2 cores (one with Yui's soul and the other with Ayanami's soul); as we saw Unit-01 taking Unit-00's core from the 10th angel, then said core fused with the Angel's blood becoming a Giant Naked Rei and finally fusing with Unit-01. If that was the original plan then it would make a lot of sense why Evangelion 8 needed to be a dual-pilot unit; each core having a control system of their own, thus needing 2 pilots to control said unit. And remember there was no other unit left to protect Lilith, so it makes sense they would use the only Evangelion Unit they had at hand to handle the situation. I may even say it would make more sense for Kaworu having to pilot the Evangelion 8 along with Shinji, as you may remeber from the next time preview Mari was being interrogated, Asuka was still in an induced comatose state (or maybe even she was now awake but learned Nerv's true ambitions and now was against their plans). So that leaves us with a recently awoken but clueless Shinji and the First Angel Kaworu to handle an Evangelion Unit.
